synopsis: Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express is a comic miniseries written by Mike Kennedy and drawn by Lucas Marangon, starring Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi. The series is composed of 2 issues released in February and June 2002.
title: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express #2
